name: 1St Advantage
description_short: 1st Advantage Federal Credit Union is a community-focused credit union offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking services to members in Virginia.
description_long: 1st Advantage Federal Credit Union has been serving its community for 75 years, operating as a member-owned financial institution rather than a profit-driven bank. The organization emphasizes local roots and community involvement through donations, volunteering, and scholarship programs for college and skilled trade students. They position themselves as a trusted alternative to traditional banks with a focus on personalized service and member advocacy. The credit union maintains multiple branch locations across Virginia (including Virginia Beach, Riverside, Newtown, and Ft. Eustis) and offers 24/7 customer support via phone, chat, and online channels. Current promotional rates include auto refinance loans as low as 3.99% APR, credit cards starting at 11.25% APR, and money market accounts up to 4.00% APY. Members benefit from a mobile banking app with a 4.7-star rating and comprehensive digital banking capabilities. Like most credit unions, 1st Advantage requires membership eligibility, which may limit access compared to traditional banks. The organization demonstrates active member communication through regular alerts about branch closures, maintenance windows, and fraud prevention guidance. Their business services include small business accounts, credit cards, and loans, indicating expansion beyond personal banking. The credit union's routing number is 251480563, and they operate under federal credit union regulation with a stated commitment to member financial well-being across all life stages. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal loans and lines of credit
Certificates of deposit (4-month special at 3.85% APY)
pros: Competitive rates: Auto refinance loans at 3.99% APR and money market accounts up to 4.00% APY
24/7 customer support available via phone (800-359-7650), chat, and online banking
Mobile banking app with strong 4.7-star rating for convenient account management
Community-focused with active scholarship programs and volunteer initiatives
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, personal loans, credit cards, and business services
Member-owned structure aligns incentives with member benefits rather than shareholder profits
Long operational history (75 years) indicates stability and established reputation
cons: Membership eligibility requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks
Limited branch network (multiple closures noted: Ft. Eustis permanently closing September 2025, Riverside consolidating March 2026)
Website content lacks specific APY rates for standard checking and savings accounts
Personal loan APR rates not clearly displayed on homepage; only auto refi rates highlighted
Occasional service disruptions (mobile banking maintenance windows noted)
best_for: Virginia residents seeking community-oriented banking with personalized service
Borrowers looking for competitive auto refinance rates (3.99% APR)
Small business owners needing credit union business accounts and lending
Members interested in credit union membership benefits and community involvement
diagnosis: 1st Advantage is ideal for Virginia-based consumers seeking a community-focused alternative to traditional banks with competitive rates and personalized service. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements apply, and the shrinking branch network (due to consolidations and closures) may limit in-person accessibility for some members.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
